raw_output_payload.reasoning: Need to output a command that prints percentage of space used on /workspace. Use df -h or df -P. For percentage: df -h /workspace | awk 'NR==2{print $5}'. That prints e.g. 45%. So command: df -h /workspace | awk 'NR==2{print $5}'.
